stderr: tm: usage: tm resume <name> [<sid-or-thread-id>] [--prompt "..."] [--engine claude|codex]  OR  tm resume --engine <claude|codex> --repo <path> --id <sid-or-thread-id> [--name <fresh>] [--intent "..."] (id may be omitted in the name form: claudemux probes both engines for a resumable session and routes the single candidate; if both engines have history, use --engine to disambiguate)
